name: skillars-prod-fw
description: Production firewall for skillars-prod server. Applied via apply-firewall.sh.

rules.description: Public HTTP (redirected to HTTPS by Traefik)
SSH — restricted to operator IP. Set SSH_ALLOWLIST_IP env var when running apply-firewall.sh.

notes: All other inbound traffic is blocked by Hetzner's implicit deny-all default.
This file is documentation only — apply-firewall.sh is authoritative.
